---
title: "Sir Francis Palgrave"
---

## Sir Francis Palgrave

**Dates:** (1788-1861)

**Maiden name:** (Cohen)

### Description

historian

### Biography

He was knighted in 1832;  he was born Cohen;  he married (1823) Elizabeth Turner.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 14th 1867
- Letter from Jany 21st [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
